cards.name: Ashley, Director of Defense
abilities: Rapid Response — You may cast this card any time you could cast an instant.
When Ashley, Director of Defense enters the battlefield, creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: Ah, oops. Sorry, let me fix that for you. Sorry!

cards.name: Danial, Curling Champion
abilities: When Danial, Curling Champion enters the battlefield, choose one —
Create a 1/1 white Sentry human creature token.
cards.flavor_text: Do you know what they call someone from Winnipeg?

cards.name: Ryan, Onboarding Specialist
abilities: When Ryan, Onboarding Specialist enters the battlefield, gain 1 customer.
Draw a card, then discard a card.
cards.flavor_text: So can I work a four-day workweek but get paid for five?

cards.name: Invoke Hospitality
abilities: Put a creature from your hand onto the battlefield.
cards.flavor_text: There's always room for one more, eh?

cards.name: Manitoban Matriarch
abilities: Whenever another creature enters the battlefield under your control, create a 1/1 white Sentry human creature token and add GWB.
cards.flavor_text: It was a revelation to Danial to see the vast network of connections his mom had across the province.

cards.name: Cluck University North
abilities: When Cluck University North enters the battlefield, you may return a Professor card from your graveyard to your hand.
cards.flavor_text: At Cluck U North, even the chickens say 'sorry' when a workflow fails.
